channel.title: BGP on ngeran[io]
channel.description: Recent content in BGP on ngeran[io]

item.title: Beyond BGP Path Selection: eBGP vs iBGP on Juniper Junos
item.description: A deep comparison of the BGP path selection process between eBGP and iBGP on Juniper platforms — tie-breakers, CLI output analysis, and production configs.

item.title: AS Path
item.description: Indicate path back to the route source and prevents routing loops.

item.title: Local Preference
item.description: The Power of Local Preference. The first BGP attribute used to favor one route over another.

item.title: BGP Attributes
item.description: BGP uses different attributes to control the advertisement and influence path selection

item.title: Route Selection
item.description: How to influance the route selection with the approptiate attributes.

item.title: Finite State Machine
item.description: This article explains the different states during the BGP neighbor negotiation
